name: check_versions
description: Validates the `version` column format and uniqueness within a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)

name: check_dates
description: Validates the `valid_on` and `valid_to` date columns of a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)

name: check_pcode_format
description: Validates the format, nulls, length, and uniqueness of each adm{L}_pcode column in a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)

name: check_pcode_hierarchy
description: Validates that each adm{L}_pcode starts with its parent adm{L-1}_pcode across all rows of a COD-AB boundary file.

args.name: file
args.description: Path to the boundary file (any pandas/geopandas-compatible format: .gpkg, .geojson, .csv, .parquet, .xlsx, etc.)
